backupMagicMain1.subheader:
Create a secure and resilient backup of your Passport Master Key.

Your Master Key will be split into three parts. Two will be stored on Keycards.

The third will be stored on Envoy, encrypted, and backed up to your Apple or Google account.
backupManualMain.subheader:
Create a {0} out of {1} backup with the three Keycards or save your seed words by writing them down.

Additional backups can be created later in Settings.
backupManualSeedQr.title: SeedQR
backupManualVerify.title: Verify Seed Words
enterPin.title: Create PIN
errorConnectionLost.content: Ensure your Passport is powered on and near your phone.
errorSecurityCheckFailed.content: This device may not be genuine or may have been tampered with during shipping. Please contact support.
errorSecurityCheckPending.content: Envoy failed to connect to Foundation servers. Please retry the check on Envoy.
importSettings.content: Would you like to restore an existing Settings & Data Backup File from a Passport Prime?
importSettingsModalWrongBackupFile.conte: The provided Settings & Data Backup File does not correspond to the restored Master Key.
inititatedPrime.content:
Envoy detected that this Passport has already been initiated.

How would you like to proceed?
keycardBackup.createIntro.content:
Passport uses short-range NFC for secure communication. For the best connection, center the Keycard over the camera to form a "T" shape as shown above.

Passport will vibrate when the Keycard is in the correct position.
keycardBackup.createIntro.title: NFC Tip
keycardBackup.magic.createContent:
To restore from your Magic Backup, you will need any two parts:

1 Keycard + Envoy
or
2 Keycards

We recommend storing your Keycards in separate locations for resilient security.
keycardBackup.magic.eraseThirdKeycardCon:
Your third Keycard no longer contains valid backup data. 

Passport will erase this card for future use.
keycardBackup.magic.modalDataDetectedCon:
This Keycard is part of a backup from a different Master Key.

By continuing, all data will be overwritten.

Are you sure you want to continue?

This Keycard is part of a backup from a different Passport Prime.

By continuing, all data will be overwritten.

Are you sure you want to continue?

This Keycard is part of an existing backup set for this Passport Prime.

By continuing, all data will be overwritten.

Are you sure you want to continue?
keycardBackup.magic.modalEnvoyErrorConte:
Passport was unable to successfully save to Envoy.

Please try again or contact support if the issue persists.
keycardBackup.magic.modalErrorContent:
Passport was unable to successfully save to this Keycard.

Please try again.
keycardBackup.magic.modalInvalidDataDete:
This Keycard contains invalid data. Ensure you are using a Foundation Keycard.

Passport will attempt to overwrite the data on this card.
keycardBackup.magic.modalInvalidThirdPar:
Backup data from a third-party device detected. 
Foundation cannot guarantee the integrity of this backup.   Do you understand the risks and want to continue?
keycardBackup.manual.modalBewareContent:
Write down these words on the backup sheet provided. Store the sheet securely and never take a photo of it.

Anyone requesting you expose these words outside of this device will gain full control over your funds. Take care.
magicBackupFound.content: Restoring your encrypted settings and data from the Foundation server
magicBackupFoundError.content: There was an error when trying to communicate with the Foundation server to restore your encrypted settings and data.
main.subheader:
Secure your entire digital life.
By proceeding, you acknowledge and accept the Terms of Use.
masterKeyDeleted.content:
To ensure your security, Passport has erased its Master Key. Your data is still preserved in an encrypted state. 

Restore access by providing the Master Key, or erase all data from this device.
masterKeyDeletedErase.content: Are you sure you want to delete all data on this device?
masterKeyDeletedErasing.title: Erase Device
masterKeyDeletedRestore.content: Choose a method to provide the Master Key.
masterKeyDeletedRestoreModalWrongKey.con: The provided Master Key does not match this device’s previous key.
masterKeyDeletedRestorePairingFirst.cont: To retrieve the Envoy part of your Master Key backup, Passport needs to reconnect with Envoy.
masterKeyDeletedRestorePairingFirst.head: Connect to Envoy
password.title: Create Password
recoverEncryptedBackupDetected.content:
Passport found an encrypted settings and data backup stored on the Foundation server.

Do you want to restore it?
recoverFileBackupCode.title: Enter Backup Code
recoverFileBackupCodeError.subheader: Backup code incorrect. Please try again.
recoverFileBackupWords.title: Enter Backup Words
recoverRestoreCardModalEmptyKeycard.cont: This Keycard has no data stored. Please try a different one.
recoverRestoreCardModalEmptyKeycard.head: Empty Keycard
recoverRestoreCardModalKeycardDoesNotMat:
This Keycard belongs to a different master key backup than the first Keycard presented.

Please try again with a different Keycard.
recoverSuccessModalNewDevice.subheader:
The backup used to restore came from a different Passport Prime.

For maximum redundancy, we strongly suggest you create a new backup now.
recoverWords.incorrectTryAgain: One or more of your seed words are incorrect. Please review and try again.
recoverWords.title: Seed Words
scanModalEnvoyCanceled.content: Onboarding canceled by Envoy. Tap below to start again.
scanModalPassportDisconnected.content: Move Passport and your phone closer to each other to attempt  reconnection from Envoy. If that fails, tap below to start over.
scanToContinue.title: Scan to Continue
scanToStart.title: Scan to Start
seedIntro.content:
The Master Key is the primary secret that protects everything on Passport.

Have Passport create a new one, or restore an existing backup using Keycards or seed words.
seedMain.content:
The Master Key protects your money and all personal data stored on Passport.

Never share the Master Key or backup outside of Passport. Doing so can result in total loss of funds and data.
seedQr.title: Scan Seed QR
seedRecoverModal.content1:
Are you sure you want to restore an existing backup or seed?
Passport will create a secure Master Key to safeguard your entire digital life.
seedRecoverModal.content2: Warning: we recommend creating a new Master Key and migrating your funds to Passport.
seedRecoverModal.header: We Recommend a New Master Key
setPin.content:
Secure your Passport with a 6-12 digit PIN.

Please record your PIN  somewhere safe.
termsOfUse.title: Terms of Use
verifyPassword.title: Verify Password
verifyPin.title: Verify PIN
